% Table: ML Detection Ablation Studies
% Generated by scripts/generate_ablation_figures.py
\begin{table}[t]
\centering
\caption{ML detection ablation studies on 436 held-out ground-truth test samples.
Panel~A shows that derived features improve detection by 1.5 percentage points.
Panel~B demonstrates that biquality training (heuristic + ground-truth) outperforms
ground-truth-only training by 3.6 points despite 491$\times$ more noisy samples.
Panel~C reveals that removing any single benchmark degrades detection on its test
partition, with custom ($-$0.934) and HACC-IO ($-$0.678) showing the largest drops.}
\label{tab:ml_ablations}
\small
\renewcommand{\arraystretch}{1.1}
\begin{tabular}{@{}llcc@{}}
\toprule
\multicolumn{4}{l}{\textbf{Panel A: Feature Contribution}} \\
\midrule
Configuration & \#Features & Micro-F1 & Macro-F1 \\
\midrule
\textbf{All features} & \textbf{157} & \textbf{0.923} & \textbf{0.900} \\
Raw counters only & 120 & 0.908 & 0.876 \\
\midrule
\multicolumn{4}{l}{\textbf{Panel B: Training Data}} \\
\midrule
Training Strategy & Samples & Micro-F1 & Macro-F1 \\
\midrule
\textbf{Biquality (heuristic + GT)} & \textbf{91K + 187} & \textbf{0.923} & \textbf{0.900} \\
GT-only & 187 & 0.887 & 0.829 \\
\midrule
\multicolumn{4}{l}{\textbf{Panel C: Leave-One-Benchmark-Out (Micro-F1)}} \\
\midrule
Left Out & With & Without & $\Delta$ \\
\midrule
IOR & 0.971 & 0.806 & $-$0.165 \\
mdtest & \textbf{1.000} & 0.344 & $-$0.656 \\
DLIO & 0.481 & 0.326 & $-$0.155 \\
h5bench & 0.987 & 0.404 & $-$0.582 \\
HACC-IO & 0.902 & 0.224 & $-$0.678 \\
custom & 0.934 & 0.000 & $-$\textbf{0.934} \\
\bottomrule
\end{tabular}
\end{table}
